why_this_action.summary: The execution board had no truthful do-now handoff packet inside the active short review window, so the highest-leverage move available now was to strengthen the live directory-proof lane itself: refresh backlink evidence and patch the shared tracker so it distinguishes Codeberg-first listings from GitHub-only mirror listings.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg is still flat and remains the primary success gate
agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane is directory_confirmation during a short-window hold
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family directory and curator overlap are live constraints
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse third-party proof and comparison framing instead of inventing another siloed packet
agents/marketing/logs/reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: Reddit remains structurally weak and blocked, so this slot should not be spent there

expected_outcome: The next curator/comparison/manual-contact execution can now cite truthful live proof and prefer Codeberg-routed listings, while clearly flagging SaaSHub as a GitHub-only mirror listing instead of treating all live listings as equivalent.
